title: Obsidian Blogger Template Plugin
first_prompt: I'd like you to create a Templater Obsidian plugin template that creates an Obsidian-blogger template. Refer to the documentation at this url (use Brave MCP): https://397ac008.linkblog-dl6.pages.dev/o
summary: Irwin was attempting to build a comprehensive Obsidian-blogger template plugin using Templater that could manage content insertion, map standard tags (like "ai" and "politics"), and provide structure for notes created with no initial content. The conversation evolved from initial template drafting to refining specific features, such as handling empty notes and incorporating local file specifications. When the template failed to execute code, the assistant diagnosed the technical flaw, instructing the user that the script must be saved as a `.js` file and called from a separate `.md` template file using the syntax `<%* await tp.user.blogTemplate(tp) %>`, concluding with the user needing help debugging the Templater plugin settings.
